title: Lock & Save Navigation Pane Arrangement

posts.author: sescott (Steve Escott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
As an Implementer, it would be amazing if I would be able to lock my Navigation Pane arrangement so that client users can’t move around the folders and their contents.
The way that I have arranged the boards, subfolders and folders in the left pane is absolutely crucial to the logical approach required to effectively use systems that I create in monday.com - I hope that you can all vote this request up!
Steve Escott
AllDayIT Ltd.
Certified monday.com Professional Services Partner
